description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Phantasm)

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: C, H

The subject is shown the illusion that it's body is slowly being covered in a layer of earth and rock, as though it is being petrified. The subject slowly suffers from progressive effects over time, which are cumulative:

- First round: Subject cannot run or charge.
- Second round: Subject moves at half its speed.
- Third round: Subject cannot move or perform actions requiring any sort of movement (even speech). They can still breathe. The subject re-

mains affected by this effect until the technique ends.

The illusion is broken if the target suffers a powerful emotion or instinctual need (such as fear or the need to flee or protect a loved one), and thus ends if the target is afflicted with panic or cowering effects. The technique also immediately ends if the target is attacked, though if they had been affected for three rounds or more, they will lose their Dexterity bonus to Defense against the first attack.

This technique can be dispelled. Creatures with 8 or more levels/HD gain a +4 bonus to saves to resist this technique.
